caption: A woman with dark, shoulder-length hair and glasses stands against a plain dark background. She is wearing a light green embroidered top with a dark necklace. Across the sequence, she speaks while gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points. In the initial moments, her hands are down or just starting to move, and by the final frames, she has raised both hands in front of her chest, palms facing each other. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the neckline of her garment. In the bottom left corner of the scene, a logo featuring a circular emblem and the text "NPTEL" is visible. The lighting remains consistent, focusing on the woman as she communicates, with the only movement being her facial expressions and the active gesturing of her hands.
